---
title: "Jiyoun Suk, PhD"
pagetitle: "Jiyoun Suk, PhD"
about:
  template: solana
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jiyoun.suk@uconn.edu
    - icon: google-scholar
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Vu2km0AAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: orcid 
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4690-2395
    - text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/jiyoun-suk.bsky.social
---

## Assistant Professor of Communication

I am an Assistant Professor in the **Department of Communication** at the **University of Connecticut,** jointly appointed with the **Program of Women's, Gender, and Sexuality Studies**. My research examines how digital platforms and AI-mediated environments shape **visibility, credibility, and political action** — with particular attention to marginalized communities in public discourse.


::: {.affiliation-list}
[Digital Politics and Gender]{.badge} [Generative AI and Trust]{.badge} [Multimodal Credibility]{.badge} [Computational Social Science]{.badge}
:::

[Learn More About Me →](about.qmd) | [View all Research Streams →](research.qmd)
